issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing filter conditions: must specify Character type requirement (includes 'CP'), must exclude [Stussy], and must specify 'look at 3 cards' mechanic with trash remainder. Current filter only checks cost.
Filter lacks type constraint. Must include condition for Character cards with type including 'CP' AND exclusion of [Stussy].
Missing action to trash remaining cards after selection. The effect requires viewing top 3, playing up to 1 qualifying card, then trashing the rest.
